description.zh-cn: 国内社交登录：微信、QQ、微博一键登录。基于核心 Laravel Socialite 流程，注册对应驱动并注入配置，复用核心 /social/{provider}/redirect 与 callback。
description.en: China social login: WeChat, QQ, Weibo. Built on the core Laravel Socialite flow by registering providers and injecting config, reusing core /social/{provider}/redirect and callback.
